title: TFC Aged Booze
description: Aged drinks with various effects for TerraFirmaCraft Classic
body:
TFC Aged Booze
==================
This mod adds aged drink variants to **TerraFirmaCraft 1.7.10** which can offer various effects!

To age drinks, you will have to fill up a barrel with the preferred alcoholic beverage of your choice and then wait 3 months!
